text:

----- Forwarded message from Sergio Lima <sergioalimajr@gmail.com> -----

From: Sergio Lima <sergioalimajr@gmail.com>
To: freebsd-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: RES: kern/120081: [ata] Hard drive not found during install FreeBSD 7.0 - RC1

Hi my friend,

I starting your suggestion for installing the FreeBSD version 7 but, don't
getting success.

So, I sending the files with description notebook hardware inventory
(getting via lspci and dmidecode on linux - Fedora 9 - livecd).

Thanks for your attention and help.

Best regards.

[]s
Sergio Lima
